_contextSnippet: SUVmax showed the highest AUROC at 1.5 h (0.992) and SUVpeak at 4 h (0.997), closely followed by SUVmax (0.996)...1.0, 0.9, 0.89, 1.0, 0.94
details: SUVmax showed highest AUROC at 1.5h (0.992) with sensitivity 1.0, specificity 0.9, PPV 0.89, NPV 1.0, accuracy 0.94 for discriminating benign vs malignant tumours
